title: schwabea ciliaris
intro: Schwabea ciliaris, also known as the golden sedge or golden grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The medicinal properties of Schwabea ciliaris include its diuretic and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Schwabea ciliaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Schwabea ciliaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin irritations.
